en: Working together with him, then, we appeal to you not to receive the grace of God in vain.
zh: 我們這些與 神同工的，也勸你們不要白受 神的恩典。

en: For he says, "In a favorable time I listened to you, and in a day of salvation I have helped you." Behold, now is the favorable time; behold, now is the day of salvation.
zh: 因為他說： “在悅納的時候，我應允了你； 在拯救的日子，我幫助了你。” 看哪！現在就是悅納的時候，現在就是拯救的日子。

en: We put no obstacle in anyone's way, so that no fault may be found with our ministry,
zh: 我們凡事都沒有妨礙人，不讓這職分受到毀謗，

en: but as servants of God we commend ourselves in every way: by great endurance, in afflictions, hardships, calamities,
zh: 反而在各樣的事上，表明自己是 神的僕人，就如持久的忍耐、患難、貧乏、困苦、

en: beatings, imprisonments, riots, labors, sleepless nights, hunger;
zh: 鞭打、監禁、擾亂、勞苦、不睡覺、禁食、

en: by purity, knowledge, patience, kindness, the Holy Spirit, genuine love,
zh: 純潔、知識、容忍、恩慈、聖靈、無偽的愛心、

en: by truthful speech, and the power of God; with the weapons of righteousness for the right hand and for the left;
zh: 真理的道、 神的大能等事上；並且是藉著左右兩手中公義的武器，

en: through honor and dishonor, through slander and praise. We are treated as impostors, and yet are true;
zh: 藉著榮耀和羞辱、壞名聲和好名譽。我們好像是騙人的，卻是真誠的，

en: as unknown, and yet well known; as dying, and behold, we live; as punished, and yet not killed;
zh: 好像是人所不知的，卻是人所共知的；好像是必死的，你看，我們卻是活著的；好像是受懲罰的，卻沒有處死；

en: as sorrowful, yet always rejoicing; as poor, yet making many rich; as having nothing, yet possessing everything.
zh: 好像憂愁，卻是常常喜樂的；好像貧窮，卻使很多人富足；好像是甚麼都沒有，卻是樣樣都有。

en: We have spoken freely to you, Corinthians; our heart is wide open.
zh: 哥林多人哪！我們對你們，口是坦率的，心是寬宏的。

en: You are not restricted by us, but you are restricted in your own affections.
zh: 並不是我們對你們器量小，而是你們自己心胸狹窄。

en: In return (I speak as to children) widen your hearts also.
zh: 你們也要照樣以寬宏的心對待我們，這話正像是我對兒女說的。

en: Do not be unequally yoked with unbelievers. For what partnership has righteousness with lawlessness? Or what fellowship has light with darkness?
zh: 你們和不信的人不可共負一軛，義和不法有甚麼相同呢？光明和黑暗怎能相通呢？

en: What accord has Christ with Belial? Or what portion does a believer share with an unbeliever?
zh: 基督和彼列 怎能和諧呢？信的和不信的有甚麼聯繫呢？

en: What agreement has the temple of God with idols? For we are the temple of the living God; as God said, "I will make my dwelling among them and walk among them, and I will be their God, and they shall be my people.
zh: 神的殿和偶像怎能協調呢？我們就是永生 神的殿，正如 神說： “我要住在他們中間， 在他們中間來往； 我要作他們的 神， 他們要作我的子民。”

en: Therefore go out from their midst, and be separate from them, says the Lord, and touch no unclean thing; then I will welcome you,
zh: 所以， “主說：你們要從他們中間出來， 和他們分開， 不可觸摸不潔淨的東西， 我就收納你們。”

en: and I will be a father to you, and you shall be sons and daughters to me, says the Lord Almighty."
zh: “我要作你們的父親， 你們要作我的兒女。 這是全能的主說的。”
